subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending the recognition of all created things and the comprehension of all contingent beings, befitteth the Court of that Most Desired One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از عرفان ممکنات و ادراک کائنات ساحت حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @suffering and imprisonment
